name: creates all four tables: course, department, enrollment, student
probe: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name;

name: enrollment uses the composite primary key (student_id, course_id)
probe: SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('enrollment') WHERE pk > 0 ORDER BY pk;

name: course has a foreign key on dept_id referencing department
enrollment has foreign keys to both student and course
